shared_attributes.purpose: provide spatial context and visual feedback
shared_attributes.rendering: background layers, no collision with player
shared_attributes.scrolling: parallax or synchronized with game speed

context.role: Provides clean background canvas for gameplay
context.usage_scenario: Always visible as lowest rendering layer, static color fill

animation.description: Static solid color background, no animation or scrolling

visual_specification.details: Simple solid color fill using Background color (#F7F7F7) from palette

relationships.shared_with: Provides backdrop for all other visual elements
relationships.differences_from: ground scrolls and has texture, clouds scroll at 50% speed, sky is completely static

explicit_negations: No clouds or decorative elements (handled by separate cloud assets)
No day/night cycle or color changes
